src: A sneaker with a thick sole and iridescent upper reflecting pink, blue, and yellow. It has white laces, a robust design, and a white sole with rugged texture.
edit: A sneaker with a thick, chunky sole in a low-poly style. The upper has a faceted crystal look reflecting pink, blue, yellow. The laces are white angular lines, and the blocky design has an angular, jagged texture on the white sole.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large rough stone outdoors, surrounded by greenery with small shrubs. A tall rock is in the background, and a city street with bicycles is visible on the left.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is positioned on the edge of a concrete embankment next to water with gentle waves in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object is on a paved surface with a rough texture, small pebbles and asphalt pieces scattered. The background is neutral without noticeable objects.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object is on lush green grass in an open space with evenly cut grass blades. No visible objects in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: the object is on an old, green wooden bench with visible cracks, surrounded by grass and a gravel path, suggesting a park or garden setting.
per_image_non_shared_src.05: the object is on speckled concrete against a red brick wall with worn, textured bricks and visible mortar lines, in an urban scene with no other buildings or objects.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object rests on a large, faceted stone amidst geometric greenery and angular shrubs, with a polygonal rock in the background. On the left, a city street features sharp-edged bicycles, all in low-poly style with flat colors and distinct shapes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object is a low-poly geometric form, with angular surfaces reflecting light, on a faceted edge of an embankment. A body of water with low-poly waves is in the background. The scene uses sharp-edged polygons and basic shapes.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is on a paved surface with angular, faceted shapes in a low-poly design, surrounded by polygonal pebbles and jagged asphalt pieces, against a simple, abstract muted color background, emphasizing the geometric, minimalist low-poly style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: the object is on low-poly grass with angular green blades in a stylized open space with sharp geometric shapes, set in a simplistic, polygonal aesthetic with no objects in the background, reflecting a video-game inspired atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: A low-poly style bench with faceted green surfaces sits surrounded by polygonal green grass. A path of gray polygonal gravel leads to the bench, featuring clean lines and faceted shapes typical of low-poly modeling.
per_image_non_shared_edit.05: The object is on a low-poly styled, faceted concrete floor. Behind is a wall of blocky red bricks with flat planes and sharp edges, featuring simplified texture lines. The scene is minimalist and abstract.
